name: lazyman-ian
description: Development workflow, iOS/Swift, and Android/Kotlin plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: dev-flow
plugins.description: Unified development workflow: planning → coding → commit → PR → release with VDD, 5-gate quality pipeline, multi-layer code review (P0-P3), 4-tier memory with instinct system, Notion pipeline, product brain, and cross-platform agent-team orchestration

plugins.name: ios-swift-plugin
plugins.description: iOS/Swift development toolkit: SwiftUI, Swift Concurrency, WidgetKit, performance optimization, system-level performance guide, technology migration advisor

plugins.name: android-kotlin-plugin
plugins.description: Android/Kotlin development toolkit: Jetpack Compose, Kotlin Coroutines, performance optimization, architecture patterns, build system, and migration guidance

plugins.name: utils
plugins.description: Code quality tools: deslop, search-code, tool-enforcer, context-warning, loop detection

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research tools: Perplexity AI, Braintrust analysis, RepoPrompt, token-analyzer, session summary
